response.global_analysis: The video features a lengthy 3D animation dialogue skit (00:00 - 04:27) followed by a musical performance of 'Lower' (ロウワー) by Nuyuri. Phonetics for the song match the reference JSON, although the performance includes dancers not explicitly named in the summary (Calliope Mori). I have transcribed the English dialogue precisely and used the reference lyrics for the song portion, confirming accuracy against the audio and visual cues.

subtitles.english: Oh get me out of this toilet!

subtitles.english: Out of that Skibidi toilet!

subtitles.english: First you take over my body...

subtitles.original: ...then you make me Skibidi toilet!
subtitles.english: ...then you make me Skibidi toilet!

subtitles.english: How do I get out of here?

subtitles.english: How could they torture me like this?

subtitles.english: Why did they make me do all those things?

subtitles.english: They didn't even feed me!

subtitles.original: They didn't even say that I was a good girl...
subtitles.english: They didn't even say that I was a good girl...

subtitles.original: ...after they made me do all those things!
subtitles.english: ...after they made me do all those things!

subtitles.english: And now I'm poor!

subtitles.original: I have to take it out on this canvas.
subtitles.english: I have to take it out on this canvas.

subtitles.original: Ooh, if I just paint what I want...
subtitles.english: Ooh, if I just paint what I want...

subtitles.original: ...then maybe I'll be rewarded for it.
subtitles.english: ...then maybe I'll be rewarded for it.

subtitles.original: Because karma comes to good people.
subtitles.english: Because karma comes to good people.

subtitles.original: So... beautiful woman... boobs...
subtitles.english: So... beautiful woman... boobs...

subtitles.original: Yes! YES! HAHAHA!
subtitles.english: Yes! YES! HAHAHA!

subtitles.original: I've done it! My greatest work yet! My painting!
subtitles.english: I've done it! My greatest work yet! My painting!

subtitles.original: Hello?
subtitles.english: Hello?

subtitles.english: Gigi?

subtitles.original: Are you in there?
subtitles.english: Are you in there?

subtitles.english: Okay, I'm gonna come in.

subtitles.original: Oh my goodness! This absolute masterpiece!
subtitles.english: Oh my goodness! This absolute masterpiece!

subtitles.english: One of the lost works of Picasso? Or no...

subtitles.original: ...it has to be Leonardo da Vinci!
subtitles.english: ...it has to be Leonardo da Vinci!

subtitles.original: It's so incredible, I've never seen anything like it.
subtitles.english: It's so incredible, I've never seen anything like it.

subtitles.original: I can't believe something like this is before my eyes.
subtitles.english: I can't believe something like this is before my eyes.

subtitles.original: Gigi!
subtitles.english: Gigi!

subtitles.original: Gigi, wake up!
subtitles.english: Gigi, wake up!

subtitles.original: Gigi, WAKE UP!
subtitles.english: Gigi, WAKE UP!

subtitles.original: Gigi, are you alright?
subtitles.english: Gigi, are you alright?

subtitles.original: Something attacked me...
subtitles.english: Something attacked me...

subtitles.original: Oh, I don't know what kind of...
subtitles.english: Oh, I don't know what kind of...

subtitles.english: Why are you screaming?

subtitles.original: Oh, beautiful woman...
subtitles.english: Oh, beautiful woman...

subtitles.original: Oh, yes! It's me. I came over just like you invited me.
subtitles.english: Oh, yes! It's me. I came over just like you invited me.

subtitles.original: Nerissa Ravencroft? Is that you?
subtitles.english: Nerissa Ravencroft? Is that you?

subtitles.original: And not the painting?
subtitles.english: And not the painting?

subtitles.original: No, but did you make this, Gigi?
subtitles.english: No, but did you make this, Gigi?

subtitles.original: I made this.
subtitles.english: I made this.

subtitles.original: It's incredible.
subtitles.english: It's incredible.

subtitles.original: You like it?
subtitles.english: You like it?

subtitles.original: I do. I thought of you while making it. Can you tell?
subtitles.english: I do. I thought of you while making it. Can you tell?

subtitles.original: I can.
subtitles.english: I can.

subtitles.original: If it's so, I am your muse. Maybe we could be together?
subtitles.english: If it's so, I am your muse. Maybe we could be together?

subtitles.original: Really?
subtitles.english: Really?

subtitles.original: Yes, no one's ever said that to me.
subtitles.english: Yes, no one's ever said that to me.

subtitles.original: I've never wanted anything quite as much after seeing this.
subtitles.english: I've never wanted anything quite as much after seeing this.

subtitles.original: The fire of my heart has been inflamed...
subtitles.english: The fire of my heart has been inflamed...

subtitles.original: ...and I feel like I cannot live without you, Gigi Murin.
subtitles.english: ...and I feel like I cannot live without you, Gigi Murin.

subtitles.original: Tickle tickle tickle! Don't scream now.
subtitles.english: Tickle tickle tickle! Don't scream now.

subtitles.original: Gigi, are you okay?
subtitles.english: Gigi, are you okay?

subtitles.original: You're tickling me.
subtitles.english: You're tickling me.

subtitles.original: You know what? I've thought a lot of thinking.
subtitles.english: You know what? I've thought a lot of thinking.

subtitles.original: Thought, thought about thinking. I've thought of it.
subtitles.english: Thought, thought about thinking. I've thought of it.

subtitles.english: And I've come up with a thing.

subtitles.english: We should get married.

subtitles.english: Oh, I thought you'd never ask!

subtitles.english: Really? Really?

subtitles.english: Why would you think that?

subtitles.english: Do you want me?

subtitles.english: I want you so bad!

subtitles.original: You have no idea how bad I want you.
subtitles.english: You have no idea how bad I want you.

subtitles.original: Let's go! Let's go home...
subtitles.english: Let's go! Let's go home...

subtitles.english: ...and consummate our marriage!

subtitles.english: What?

subtitles.english: What? I don't know if I'm ready for that!

subtitles.english: I don't either! I don't know!

subtitles.original: そう簡単な祈りだった
subtitles.english: It was such a simple prayer.

subtitles.english: Since the curtain is about to fall,

subtitles.english: I bid farewell to the quiet venue.
